name: Cartographer
lead: Describe an outdoor area, pick a layout sketch, and export a finished battle map. Early access is in preparation.
detailBody: Cartographer is a web tool, not a Foundry module in v1. Describe forest clearings, shorelines, ruins in the open, and the tool returns layout options before rendering a high-resolution map you can drop into any VTT.
Early access will run through Patreon. The hosted app handles generation; this page is the public entry point once hosting is live.
disclosure: Map images are produced with generative AI. Draft sketches use a fast model; final renders use a higher-quality pass. We disclose this up front so you can decide whether it fits your table.
